tweets.text:
A few examples of meme coins having huge corrections then ripping

$PNUT - dropped 78% then pumped 660x
$PEPE - dropped 88% then pumped 550x
Popcat - dropped 93% then pumped 1600x

You cant have a weak stomach in the trenches. You cant have 500x+ gains w/o volatility 

$MANIFEST is a good example of this - going through it's first major correction due to liquidity being sucked into ANSEM and now Robinhood chain.

Coins with strong communities and foundations are what thrive. Community is growing & holder count is exploding during this correction. This is exactly what you want to see 

Manifest below $10M is an insane deal.. I think we are in the early innings of Solana onchain and the new bull market. This dip is a blessing in disguise

This is going to be the next billion dollar runner when the market heats up

Manifesting it

tweets.text:
US refineries are maxed out, but we can't build product storage because 1) end-user demand remains healthy and 2) we are exporting everything we can because the rest of the world is short on products.

Meanwhile, prices have to keep going higher domestically to try and price out exports. And since the rest of the world is short, this only pulls prices higher faster.

And since China lifted the product export ban, teapot refineries can buy whatever crude they want and still make money because refining margins are so elevated.

The next big catalyst to watch is what China does with domestic fuel pricing. If it matches to global prices, watch out. Teapot refinery utilization will hit a new record high, which means the spread between crude and crack spreads will come down pushing crude meaningfully higher.
tweets.full_text:

And since China lifted the product export ban, teapot refineries can buy whatever crude they want and still make money because refining margins are so elevated.

The next big catalyst to watch is what China does with domestic fuel pricing. If it matches to global prices, watch out. Teapot refinery utilization will hit a new record high, which means the spread between crude and crack spreads will come down pushing crude meaningfully higher.

tweets.text:
I don't know why this is not the market's view. There's no diplomatic solution to the Strait of Hormuz.

There's no middle ground. There's no US or Iran route, there's only going to be one victor at the end of the day. You either get status quo (free and clear) or you get Iran controlling it.

The MOU was a joke. The diplomatic route is dead.
